entities.name: SEMI-ARID OR DRY TROPICS (SAT)
entities.description: Climatic regions characterized by low rainfall and high temperatures.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where ICRISAT operates in semi-arid or dry tropics.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA (SSA)
entities.description: A region of Africa where ICRISAT operates in semi-arid or dry tropics.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization focusing on research for development.

entities.name: HIGH VALUE COMMODITIES AND PRODUCTS
entities.description: Agricultural products that command a higher price in the market.

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research, an organization setting research priorities.

entities.name: RURAL POVERTY
entities.description: The state of lacking financial resources in rural agricultural communities.

entities.name: AGRICULTURE DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the variety of crops or agricultural activities.
